prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic, minimalist travel-aesthetic poster about Tokyo, combining monumental architecture photography with refined editorial typography and delicate Chinese/Japanese text overlays.

Canvas: Wide horizontal poster, 16:9 aspect ratio. Use a cold, clean, quiet, ceremonial mood with deep navy-blue shadows and pale morning sunlight. The scene is a vast modern urban facade made of tall dark blue wall panels, narrow vertical seams, a few horizontal window strips, and an open pale concrete plaza at the bottom. Place one tiny lone pedestrian near the lower left-center for scale, walking across the empty plaza with a long subtle shadow. The architecture should feel enormous, still, and slightly surreal.

Layout: Split the poster visually into a left information column and a right title column, both integrated directly onto the building surface in thin white typography. Keep generous negative space and precise alignment.

Left side text and elements: At the top left, small widely letter-spaced English text: “GOOD MORNING”. Below it, create exactly 5 discrete editorial information items: 1) a rounded rectangular label with “01” and the Chinese line “地标｜东京塔与山手线”; 2) a thin horizontal rule section labeled “02” with “气息｜站台广播、夏祭薄风、清晨街角”; 3) a circular badge labeled “03” containing “色彩｜靛蓝 / 提灯红 / 和纸白”; 4) a small diamond icon with “收藏价值” and tiny English “COLLECTIBLE VALUE”; 5) a small classical-column icon with “美学价值” and tiny English “AESTHETIC VALUE”.

Right side title area: Create a large vertical title in white Chinese characters using 东京, positioned on the right half. Beside it, set vertical spaced Latin letters “TOKYO”. Under the main title, add a small red circular seal stamp and tiny Japanese-style text reading “東京” and “とうきょう”. Add a thin horizontal divider line. Below it, set the date 2026-07-10. Under the date, add the Chinese morning quote 早安，愿你在秩序与霓光之间，保持清醒与温柔。. At the far right edge, include a tall narrow ornamental frame labeled “04” with vertical Chinese text “漫游｜先去便利店买一瓶冰水”. Near the lower right, include a bordered rectangular note labeled “05 记忆｜收藏日常里的 精准与留白”.

Visual style: Ultra-clean PPT/editorial logic, premium magazine poster, Japanese urban minimalism, cold monochrome blue palette, crisp white hairline rules, elegant serif typography for Chinese title, thin sans-serif for labels, slight film grain, realistic architectural photography, balanced empty space, quiet morning atmosphere.

Constraints: Use exactly the 5 numbered content items 01–05 described above, plus the two value icons. Do not add extra people, vehicles, signs, neon, clutter, watermark, or random text. Keep the typography sharp and legible, with the enormous building facade as the dominant subject.
